name: hDNAgr HSC aging registry is not yet recruiting with no posted results
summary: NCT06877377 is a planned randomized placebo-controlled hDNAgr aging registry in adults aged 45 to 65, but it remained not yet recruiting with no posted results in the June 9, 2026 API view.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT06877377 as a 60-participant not-yet-recruiting hDNAgr therapy registry with estimated 2026 completion dates, safety and aging-biomarker endpoints, and no posted results in the June 9, 2026 API view.
quantitative_note: Estimated enrollment is 60; registry status is not yet recruiting; result status is not posted.
caveats: No-results registry status is not evidence of efficacy.
The estimated completion dates were already past while the registry still listed not-yet-recruiting status.
The mechanism, safety profile, telomere effects, CD34-positive progenitor effects, biological-age endpoints, and SF-36 outcomes remain unverified.
